public String strWithout3a3b(int a, int b) {
    StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
    char lastChar = '\0';
    int lastCount = 0;

    while (a > 0 || b > 0) {
        if (lastCount >= 2) {
            if (lastChar == 'a') {
                if (b > 0) {
                    sb.append('b');
                    b--;
                    lastChar = 'b';
                    lastCount = 1;
                }
            } else {
                if (a > 0) {
                    sb.append('a');
                    a--;
                    lastChar = 'a';
                    lastCount = 1;
                }
            }
        } else {
            if (a > b) {
                sb.append('a');
                a--;
                lastChar = 'a';
                lastCount++;
            } else {
                sb.append('b');
                b--;
                lastChar = 'b';
                lastCount++;
            }
        }
    }

    return sb.toString();
}

solution: 
```java
class Solution {
    public String strWithout3a3b(int a, int b) {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        char lastChar = '\0';
        int lastCount = 0;
        
        while (a > 0 || b > 0) {
            if (lastCount >= 2) {
                if (lastChar == 'a') {
                    if (b > 0) {
                        sb.append('b');
                        b--;
                        lastChar = 'b';
                        lastCount = 1;
                    }
                } else {
                    if (a > 0) {
                        sb.append('a');
                        a--;
                        lastChar = 'a';
                        lastCount = 1;
                    }
                }
            } else {
                if (a > b) {
                    sb.append('a');
                    a--;
                    lastChar = 'a';
                    lastCount++;
                } else {
                    sb.append('b');
                    b--;
                    lastChar = 'b';
                    lastCount++;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return sb.toString();
    }
}
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(a + b)

energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution efficiently constructs the string by greedily appending characters while ensuring no three consecutive 'a's or 'b's. It tracks the last character and its count to avoid invalid sequences, achieving linear time complexity relative to the input size.
